meta.description: Represents an argument to a TypeScript function

skills.claude: The 'types' array accepts either: (1) a Kanecta type UUID referencing a type definition whose JSON schema will be converted to a TypeScript type, or (2) a TypeScript primitive string such as 'string', 'number', 'boolean', 'Date', 'any', 'unknown', 'void', 'null', 'undefined', 'never'.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_4a348b0c_a840_4c6f_bdff_eba654480bfb" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "types" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "description" TEXT,
    "prompt" TEXT,
    "nullable" BOOLEAN,
    "optional" BOOLEAN,
    "default_value" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_4a348b0c_a840_4c6f_bdff_eba654480bfb" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_4a348b0ca8404c6f_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
